plan.failureSummary: The cached automation failed because it attempted to fill a 'Last Name' field which is no longer present in the UI. Visual evidence shows the form has been updated to use 'Your Name' instead.
observedIndicators: Visual mismatch: cache expects 'Last Name', UI shows 'Your Name'
Flexible semantic intent detected in overallObjective
Error occurs during deterministic playback of cached steps

remediationSteps.summary: Clear page.ai cache and retry the test.
remediationSteps.details: The 'page.ai' instruction is flexible. Deleting the deterministic cache will force the agent to re-examine the page and adapt to the updated form fields.

remediationSteps.summary: Verify UI changes and update any hardcoded selectors if present in the main test file.
remediationSteps.details: If the 'data-testid' or labels have changed globally, ensure the application's testability remains high, but in this case, the autonomous agent should handle the adjustment once the cache is cleared.

plan.notes: The failure is a classic case of stale deterministic cache following a UI change. The AI instruction is semantically flexible ('Fill out the all of the survey questions'), so clearing the cache will allow the agent to adapt to the new form structure.
